sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36498" key="e)cagoreuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξᾰγορ-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n36498.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who confesses</tr_> his sins, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg007:158" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">158</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
